title: The Tooth Keeper
overview: Michael, a stressed college student, is looking forward to summer. On the last day of school, he breaks a tooth, an event that seems to summon a sinister figure known as the Toothkeeper. As Michael's conflict with the creature intensifies, a secret is revealed.
